## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Test Evidence

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Risk Checklist

- [ ] No bookmark data is uploaded or logged unexpectedly.
- [ ] HTML import/export paths escape or reject unsafe content.
- [ ] Local Web server behavior remains local-only by default.
- [ ] New dependencies are justified.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes.
